title: Project Management API
description: Create endpoints to list, load, create, and save projects. Implement logic to load the 'last used' project on startup, and seed a default CAD script if the cache is completely empty.

title: Build CAD Compiler Engine
description: Implement the core execution engine that runs design.py using build123d. Add support for multiple export formats (STL, STEP, GLB) based on user selection.

title: Generic Compiler UI
description: Build a React UI to manage projects (New/Load) and select the target export format. Ensure all UI text remains completely generic and agnostic to the actual CAD content being generated.
